hyperedges.label: App-wide enums defined in AppConstants file
Habit read and write providers consuming habitDaoProvider
Settings and Pavlok API providers forming settings management layer
Cross-platform plugin registration: connectivity_plus, flutter_local_notifications, package_info_plus, path_provider, shared_preferences, sqflite, workmanager
Linux Flutter message codec types (JSON, Standard, Method)
Linux application entry point chain: main -> MyApplication -> FlView -> fl_register_plugins
iOS AppIcon Set - all resolution variants of the iOS app icon sharing identical Flutter default logo design
iOS Launch Image Set - all resolution variants of the blank white Flutter launch image placeholder
Android Launcher Icon Set - all density bucket variants of the Android launcher icon sharing Flutter default logo design
Flutter Default Branding - all app icons across iOS and Android that display the unmodified Flutter default logo, indicating no custom branding has been applied to HabitPulse
